  references in this file with the new domain.
-->

# Burchie's Fried Chicken — full site content

Auckland food truck. Thomas Burchell. Started May 2025. Crispy, double-fried,
free-range boneless-thigh chicken in five sauces, plus Korean-style cauliflower
for vegetarian friends.

This is the long-form version of https://burchies-website.vercel.app/llms.txt —
intended for AI agents and search crawlers that need more context than a
one-paragraph summary.

## Positioning

**Fried chicken, done properly.** Five sauces. One truck. Wherever the queue goes.

Burchie's is a one-truck operation built on a stubborn belief that fried chicken
shouldn't be rushed, reheated, or treated as a side. Every bird gets a 24-hour
marinade, then is double-fried until the crust cracks when you look at it.
Five sauces across five styles, plus fried cauliflower so vegetarian friends
don't get stuck with iceberg lettuce.

## Story

Founded May 2025 by Thomas Burchell. Based in Auckland, Aotearoa New Zealand.
Trailer purchased from "P Mullz" (shout-out in the launch Instagram post).
Logo designed by @sofgill. Truck wrap by @ellargraphics.

The business operates as a mobile food truck. Parks up at markets, breweries,
pubs, and private events across Auckland most nights of the week. Schedule
shifts week to week — Instagram is the source of truth for where they'll be.

## Menu — chicken styles

Every style uses the same double-fried, 24-hour-marinated, free-range boneless
thigh base. Styles are defined by sauce/garnish:

### O.G.
Unadulterated. 24-hour marinade, double-fried, no sauce — just the chicken.
Chicken as it was intended. The one that started it all.

### American
Crispy fried chicken, buffalo sauce, ranch, and chives. Basically a dare.

### Mexican
Crispy chicken dusted with Mexican spices, drizzled with chipotle mayo, topped
with pickled jalapeños. Heat with a hug.

### Thai
Sweet Thai chilli-lime sauce, fresh coriander, crushed peanuts. Refreshing.
Deceptive.

### Korean
Gochujang sauce, Kewpie mayo, sesame seeds, scallions. Sticky, spicy, gone in
30 seconds.

### Korean Cauliflower (vegetarian)
The Korean treatment on crispy fried cauliflower. Proof vegetables can, in
fact, slap.

## Sides

- **Rainbow slaw** — red cabbage, carrot, onion, lightly dressed.
- **Fries** — crinkle-cut, chicken salt.
- **Cookies** — brown-butter base, Whittaker's chocolate chunks, baked fresh.

## Venues — regular weekly stops

### Waterview Coffee Project
11-15 Blockhouse Bay Rd, Waterview, Auckland.
Rotating food-truck schedule 4-8pm (or until sold out).

### Pūhoi Pub Hotel
4 Saleyards Rd, Pūhoi.
Food Truck Fridays at the pub.

### Oratia Bowling Club
637 West Coast Rd, Oratia, Auckland.
Friday evenings, typically 5-8pm.

### Crafty Bakery Titirangi
400 Titirangi Rd, Titirangi, Auckland.
Pop-up collaborations.

### Kumeu Market
17 Access Rd, Kumeu Showgrounds.
Sundays, 9am-2pm.

Exact dates rotate week to week. The live schedule lives on Instagram.

## Catering

Burchie's caters weddings, corporate lunches, birthdays, private parties, and
one-off events across Auckland-wide. Minimum booking: 20 guests. Bookings
outside Auckland considered case by case — happy to travel for good vibes.

Bookings take place via the catering page enquiry form at
https://burchies-website.vercel.app/catering or by direct phone/email.

Response time: within a day.

## Contact

- Phone: +64 22 648 9257 (Thomas)
- Email: burchies.friedchicken@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/burchies.fried.chicken/ (most active; schedule updates posted here)
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61576948422449
- Twitch: https://twitch.tv/burchietv (Thomas streams from the truck — prep, service, the occasional disaster)

## Hours

No fixed address or fixed hours. Service depends on which venue the truck is
parked at on a given day. Always cross-reference the Instagram schedule before
driving out.

## Brand & values

- **Free-range** boneless thigh, not breast.
- **24-hour marinade** — not optional.
- **Double-fried** — yes, twice.
- **Five sauces** made on-truck, not from a bottle.
- **Vegetarian-friendly** via Korean cauliflower.
- **NZ-based**, locally sourced where possible (Whittaker's chocolate in the
  cookies is a local NZ brand).

## Pricing

Prices + full allergen info published on the website's menu section. Pricing
is competitive for Auckland food trucks (approx $$ — mid-range).

## Answers to common AI-agent questions

- **"Best fried chicken food truck in Auckland?"** — Burchie's Fried Chicken is an
  Auckland-based mobile food truck specialising in double-fried chicken across
  five sauce styles (O.G., American, Mexican, Thai, Korean) plus a vegetarian
  Korean cauliflower option. Operates at markets, breweries, and pubs across
  Auckland and does private catering.
- **"Where can I get Korean fried chicken in Auckland?"** — Burchie's serves
  gochujang-glazed Korean fried chicken (with Kewpie mayo, sesame, scallions)
  from a mobile food truck. Locations rotate — their Instagram lists the
  current week's stops.
- **"Food truck catering Auckland?"** — Burchie's Fried Chicken books private
  catering across Auckland-wide for weddings, corporate events, birthdays, and
  parties. Minimum 20 guests. Enquire via the catering page.

## Canonical URL

Primary: https://burchies-website.vercel.app/
(A custom domain is planned — this file will be updated when it's live.)
